revision_summary:
Four targeted fixes required before production routing:

1. RECLASSIFY cherry_pick_moments[3] (05:25): Change classification from 'rapport_repair' to 'buy_in_signal' or 'enthusiasm_signal'. There is no prior rapport damage in this call — the label is unsupported. Also correct the schema_reference from 'coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring' to 'coaching_philosophy.energy_match', which is the actually relevant section for the energy-matching alternative hypothesis.

2. FLIP primary/alternative hypothesis at cherry_pick_moments[3] (05:25): The alternative hypothesis (Holland is deliberately energy-matching a cautious customer) is at least as well-supported as the 'missed opportunity' read, and the schema explicitly supports energy-matching for this demographic. Promote the energy-match read to primary and reframe the coaching implication accordingly — the coaching question becomes 'was the bridge phrase strong enough within a low-energy register?' not 'why didn't Holland amplify the moment?'

3. CORRECT coaching_implication in cherry_pick_moments[7] (03:09, conditional_booking): Remove the claim that Holland 'should also have asked whether there's a co-buyer on the purchase.' Holland explicitly asks this at 04:34 ('Is there gonna be anybody else on the title of the home with you?') and Jim confirms 'Just me.' This is a factual error in the coaching implication that would produce incorrect feedback to the manager.

4. ADD three missed moments to cherry_pick_moments: (a) 01:26 — Holland executes verify.prior_designs and surfaces that Jim has no competing quotes (first-look customer with no competitive anchoring — critical for the closer's handoff brief); (b) 02:36 — Holland correctly deploys the credit qualifier and uses Jim's confirmation to reframe his skepticism (positive execution moment that balances the otherwise critical brief); (c) 04:29 — Holland self-corrects on homeowner status mid-sentence and executes the title co-owner verify item (positive situational awareness that partially mitigates the conditional_booking fragility concern).

Secondary fix (lower priority): Soften 'compliance issue' language in cherry_pick_moments[1] coaching_implication to 'accuracy gap' or 'coaching gap' — the veteran incentives claim may be improvised or misremembered, but 'compliance issue' implies regulatory exposure that is not established by the transcript.
